PETOAID · Jeju, Korea

Jeju Flounder
Drink

A slow-brewed hydration drink made from 100% Jeju flatfish — crafted to solve the #1 cat health challenge: water intake.

50g × 20 pouches Human-Grade Grain Free No Additives

The Star Ingredient

Jeju Olive Flounder
Paralichthys olivaceus

A premium white-flesh flatfish farmed exclusively on Jeju Island — prized across Asia for its clean flavor, low fat content, and exceptional protein density. Exported to the US, Japan, China, Taiwan & Singapore.

  • 🐟
    99% Liquid Broth Moisture-rich broth, not a supplement. Designed to increase daily water intake naturally.
  • 🏝️
    100% Jeju Flounder Sourced from Asia's only flatfish farm on Jeju Island. Exported to US, Japan, Singapore & more.
  • 🦠
    19 Probiotic Strains Supports digestion, gut health, and urinary tract function.
  • 🧂
    Low Sodium · 4 Ingredients Only No preservatives, no artificial flavors. Just whole flatfish and nature.

PENEFIT · Incheon, Korea

Palette
Powder

A capsule-format meal topper in 6 natural flavors. One 4g capsule = 4 servings — open and sprinkle just 1g per meal for a functional nutrition boost every day.

Cats & Dogs 6 Flavors 4 Servings / Capsule Vitamin & Mineral
  • 🎨
    6 Natural Flavors Chlorella · Broccoli · Purple Sweet Potato · Psyllium Husk · Kabocha · Beetroot
  • 💊
    1 Capsule, 4 Servings Each 4g capsule contains 4 individual servings. Use just 1g per meal — portion accurately with the included measuring spoon.
  • 🥄
    Measuring Spoon Included A dedicated 1g measuring spoon is included in every pack for precise, fuss-free portioning every time.
  • 💧
    Encourages Hydration Mixing with dry kibble improves palatability and water intake simultaneously.
  • 🌿
    Vitamin & Mineral Boost Functional nutrition every meal. No fillers, naturally sourced ingredients.

Why Korean Pet Products?

Quality you can trust.
Backed by science.

🏭

HACCP Certified Manufacturing

All products manufactured in HACCP-certified facilities meeting international food safety standards — the same applied to human food.

🔬

Science-backed Formulations

Every ingredient and dosage grounded in peer-reviewed research. Functional nutrition, not marketing hype.

🌿

Natural, No Compromises

No artificial preservatives, no fillers, no shortcuts. Premium ingredients from Korea's finest natural resources.
